message:
perf(join): Add batch probe with SIMD hashing and prefetching

- Add LinearHashTable.probeBatch() for batch probe with prefetching
- Pre-allocate result lists with ensureTotalCapacity
- Use bitmaps instead of hash maps for outer join tracking
- Use appendAssumeCapacity to avoid bounds checks

JOIN performance: 101K → 290K rows/sec (2.9x improvement)
Now within 15% of Polars (341K) while still single-threaded
